ticket.title: Add jitter to network retry backoff
ticket.description: Deterministic retries cause a thundering herd during outages. Add jitter without changing call sites.

specBundle.content:
- [ ] Apply jitter to the delay calculation
- [ ] Add a bounds test
Use full jitter in the [0.5, 1.5) range.

operatorComments: Use Math.random(); do not add a new dependency.
